chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 15 of 2021 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.93/2021 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.753/2024 4. For hearing of CMA No.94/2021 (Limitation Act) 5. For hearing of main case 22.04.2024 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Applicants are present, do not press this Civil Revision Application. Learned AAG Sindh has no objection to it. Accordingly, this Civil Revision Application, in view of the above joint statement, is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
